title: Create custom roadmaps directly from your project menu
description: Jira Product Discovery is an Atlassian app that allows people to create custom roadmaps. You can add or edit information such as dates, assignees, and more. You may now see a recommendation in your project menu about Jira Product Discovery roadmaps. You can select this recommendation, add Jira Product Discovery, and create a new project with a custom roadmap template. Only admins will see this recommendation.
